title: RDL Limit Stability: Explicit Formula Deep Analysis

von_mangoldt.object: Von Mangoldt explicit formula and EML depth decomposition
von_mangoldt.under_rh: ρ = 1/2+iγ: x^ρ = √x · e^{iγ ln x} → error is √x·oscillation (ET=1·3=3 but bounded by √x)
von_mangoldt.ecl_impact: ECL confirms: zero-sum has ET=3; zeros all at Re=1/2 → O(√x log²x) error

generalized.object: Generalized explicit formula for L-functions and EML

depths.main_term: L'/L(E,1/2): EML-3 (logarithmic derivative of EML-3 function)

weil_explicit.formula: Σ f(γ_n) = f̂(0) + f̂(1) - Σ_p Σ_m (ln p/p^m)^{1/2} [f(m ln p) + f(-m ln p)]

depths.lhs: ET=3: sum over imaginary parts of zeros
depths.rhs_prime: ET=2: real prime sums (ln p real measurements)
depths.weil: Weil explicit formula: EML-3 zeros ↔ EML-2 prime sums — Langlands instance

weil_explicit.significance: Weil explicit formula = the prime/zero duality; instance of LUC

error.classical_ingham: π(x) = Li(x) + O(√x log x) under RH
error.refined_cramer: π(x) - Li(x) = O(√x (log x)^2 / log log x) (Schoenfeld 1976 conditional RH)

eml_refinement.error_structure: Error = Σ x^{1/2+iγ}/ρ: oscillatory EML-3 sum; bounded by √x
eml_refinement.distinction: ET measures structural complexity, not magnitude
eml_refinement.ecl_role: ECL ensures all ρ have Re=1/2; error sum is well-structured (no ET=∞ terms)

error.new_theorem: T123: Explicit Formula ECL Decomposition (S401): ψ(x) = EML-0 + EML-3 + EML-1; ECL stabilizes EML-3 component

verdicts.generalized: Weil explicit formula = EML-3 zeros ↔ EML-2 primes: LUC instance
verdicts.error: Error under RH: ET=3 but bounded by √x (EML-1 magnitude)

key_theorem: Explicit Formula ECL Decomposition (T123, S401): Von Mangoldt formula: ψ(x) = EML-0 (x) + EML-3 (zero sum) + EML-1 (trivial). Dominant term: zero sum Σ x^ρ/ρ has ET=3; ECL ensures all ρ are on Re=1/2. Under RH: error O(√x log²x) has ET=3 (oscillatory) but magnitude EML-1 (√x). Weil explicit formula: EML-3 zeros ↔ EML-2 prime sums — Langlands Universality instance. ECL role: stabilizes the EML-3 zero-sum component; prevents ET=∞ runaway.
rabbit_hole_log: Weil explicit formula: EML-3 zeros ↔ EML-2 primes = LUC instance
Error under RH: ET=3 structure but √x magnitude
ECL stabilizes zero sum; prevents ET runaway at off-line zeros
NEW: T123 Explicit Formula ECL Decomposition
